featureGroups.label: License
featureGroups.description: License configuration for paid Pro and Enterprise package entry points.

props.name: rowHeight
props.description: default 32

props.name: headerHeight
props.description: default 40

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: default true

props.name: icons
props.description: Override built-in icons (column unpin icon uses `pinClear`).

props.name: inlineStyleOverrides
props.description: Scoped selector overrides emitted with `!important`. Useful when you need to override internal inline styles.

props.name: fillWidth
props.description: Grow data columns when their measured width total is smaller than the grid layout width, keeping header and body columns flush with the parent.

props.name: systemColumns
props.description: Ordering/pinning for built-in system columns (row index/select/reorder/etc).

props.name: annotate
props.description: Show the coordinate label and the original header title together, e.g. `A : Date`.

props.name: label
props.type: (args: { column: GridColumn; index: number; defaultLabel: string; }) => ReactNode

props.name: annotate
props.description: Show the keyed row label and the original row label together when they differ.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the row-key column (default uses system width).

props.name: headerLabel
props.description: Header label for the row-key column (top-left cell).

props.name: label
props.type: (args: { row: GridRow; rowIndex: number; visualIndex: number; defaultLabel: string; }) => ReactNode

props.name: enableCellContentVirtualization
props.description: Defers heavy inner cell content until visible. Disabled by default.

props.name: rowBufferPx
props.description: Extra vertical pixels rendered before and after the visible row window.

props.name: columnBufferPx
props.description: Extra horizontal pixels rendered before and after the visible column window.

props.name: enableFormulaBar
props.description: default true

props.name: formulaReferenceMode
props.description: How formula references resolve when rows/columns move.

props.name: enableCellSelection
props.description: default true

props.name: isRowSelection
props.description: default true

props.name: isColSelection
props.description: default true

props.name: groupSelects
props.description: Group row checkbox behavior for client-side grouped rows. - `self`: toggles only the group row itself. - `descendants` / `filteredDescendants`: toggles descendant rows. Defaults to `descendants` for backward compatibility.

props.name: rowCellSelectionMode
props.description: Header/checkbox row->cell overlay behavior. Default: `range`.

props.name: columnCellSelectionMode
props.description: Header/checkbox column->cell overlay behavior. Default: `range`.

props.name: rowCellSelectionIncludeSpans
props.description: Expand row-based cell overlay to merged spans. Default: true.

props.name: columnCellSelectionIncludeSpans
props.description: Expand column-based cell overlay to merged spans. Default: true.

props.name: onSelectionChange
props.description: convenience

props.name: onRowSelectionChange
props.description: Fired with explicit selected row ids. In SSRM selection-state mode, this contains currently loaded selected ids.

props.name: onCellClick
props.type: ( rowIndex: number, colIndex: number, event: ReactMouseEvent ) => void

props.name: onCellDoubleClick
props.type: ( rowIndex: number, colIndex: number, cellElement?: HTMLElement ) => void

props.name: isCellEditing
props.description: default true

props.name: onCellChange
props.type: ( rowId: string | number, columnKey: string, value: CellValue ) => void

props.name: applySelectionFillRequest
props.type: { token: number; color: string | null; selection?: GridSelection | null; }
props.description: Apply/clear background fill for the current selection (or an override range) when `token` changes. This triggers `onCellChange` for each targeted cell. Client row model only (SSRM is ignored).

props.name: onRowAdd
props.description: Optional higher-level row ops

props.name: validateOn
props.description: When to validate during edit.

props.name: validateDebounceMs
props.description: Debounce live validation on change in ms.

props.name: validateOnVisibleChange
props.description: Validate only visible rows when the viewport changes.

props.name: validateVisibleOnly
props.description: When validating visible rows, replace the validation map with only visible rows.

props.name: validateVisibleDebounceMs
props.description: Debounce visible-row validation in ms.

props.name: validateAllToken
props.description: Trigger a full validateAll run when this token changes.

props.name: ruleResolverByColumn
props.type: Record< string, (ctx: GridValidationContext) => GridValidationRule[] | null | undefined >

props.name: indicator
props.description: Validation indicator style.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Show validation tooltip.

props.name: highlightErrors
props.description: Highlight invalid cells.

props.name: highlightWarnings
props.description: Highlight warning cells.

props.name: highlightInfo
props.description: Highlight info-level cells.

props.name: filterMode
props.description: default "client"

props.name: onServerFilter
props.description: Server-side hook (if filterMode === "server")

props.name: enableFloatingFilters
props.description: Show floating filter row under headers.

props.name: floatingFilterHeight
props.description: Height of floating filter row in px.

props.name: floatingFilterDebounceMs
props.description: Debounce floating filter input changes in ms.

props.name: enableAdvancedMultiFilter
props.description: Enable advanced multi-filter UI (stacked blocks).

props.name: renderColumnFilterPanel
props.description: Override column filter panel renderer for header filter popovers.

props.name: renderFloatingFilterCell
props.description: Override floating filter row cell renderer.

props.name: sortMode
props.description: default "client"

props.name: onServerSort
props.description: Server-side hook (if sortMode === "server")

props.name: query
props.description: Search query string.

props.name: enabled
props.description: Enable/disable search.

props.name: mode
props.description: Highlight only or filter rows to matching results.

props.name: caseSensitive
props.description: Match case (default false).

props.name: wholeWord
props.description: Match whole words only (default false).

props.name: highlight
props.description: Highlight matches inside cell text (default true).

props.name: highlightClassName
props.description: Override highlight className for <mark> tags.

props.name: highlightStyle
props.description: Override highlight style for <mark> tags.

props.name: activeHighlightClassName
props.description: Override active-match highlight className for the currently navigated hit.

props.name: activeHighlightStyle
props.description: Override active-match highlight style for the currently navigated hit.

props.name: columns
props.description: Limit search to specific column keys.

props.name: activeMatchIndex
props.description: Active match index for search navigation.

props.name: onActiveMatchChange
props.type: ( match: GridSearchMatch | null, meta: { index: number; total: number } ) => void
props.description: Called when the active match changes (navigation).

props.name: onResultsCountChange
props.description: Called when search result count changes.

props.name: isRowPinning
props.description: default true

props.name: isColPinning
props.description: default true

props.name: onPinColumnAtPosition
props.type: ( columnKey: string, side: PinColumnSide, index: number ) => void

props.name: onPinAndPositionColumn
props.type: ( columnKey: string, targetKey: string, side: PinColumnSide, position: "before" | "after" ) => void

props.name: onPinnedColumnReorder
props.type: ( columnKey: string, targetKey: string, side: PinColumnSide, position: "before" | "after" ) => void

props.name: onPinRow
props.type: (rowId: string | number, side: PinRowSide | null) => void

props.name: onPinRowAtPosition
props.type: ( rowId: string | number, side: PinRowSide, index: number ) => void

props.name: onPinMultipleRowsAtPosition
props.type: ( operations: Array<{ rowId: string | number; side: PinRowSide; index: number; }> ) => void

props.name: onPinAndPositionRow
props.type: ( rowId: string | number, targetRowId: string | number, side: PinRowSide, position: "before" | "after" ) => void

props.name: onPinnedRowReorder
props.type: ( rowId: string | number, targetRowId: string | number, side: PinRowSide, position: "before" | "after" ) => void

props.name: onReorderMultiplePinnedRows
props.type: ( rowIds: (string | number)[], targetRowId: string | number, side: PinRowSide, position: "before" | "after" ) => void

props.name: renderRowPinCell
props.description: Full renderer override for the dedicated row pinning system cell.

props.name: isColReorder
props.description: default true

props.name: isRowReorder
props.description: default true

props.name: columnReorderMode
props.description: How column reordering should be interpreted for formula references.

props.name: rowReorderMode
props.description: How row reordering should be interpreted for formula references.

props.name: onMultiRowReorder
props.type: ( rowIds: (string | number)[], targetIndex: number, position: "before" | "after" ) => void

props.name: onMultiColumnReorder
props.type: ( columnKeys: string[], targetKey: string, position: "before" | "after" ) => void

props.name: enableColumnResize
props.description: default true

props.name: enableRowResize
props.description: default true

props.name: mode
props.description: Immediate or deferred commit behaviour for resize drag.

props.name: quantize
props.description: Pixel step for column resizing (0 disables snapping).

props.name: heightStep
props.description: Pixel step for row resizing (0 disables snapping).

props.name: columnResizeThrottle
props.description: Throttle mode for column resize commits.

props.name: rowResizeThrottle
props.description: Throttle mode for row resize commits.

props.name: performanceMode
props.description: When true, row and column size changes are only committed once the user releases the resize handle. This reduces reflow churn for very large grids.

props.name: initialMergedCells
props.description: Initial merged regions shown when spanning is enabled.

props.name: onMergedCellsChange
props.description: Fired whenever merge / unmerge interactions change the merged regions.

props.name: enableCellSpanning
props.description: Enable/disable spanning at the Grid level

props.name: rowIdMergeMode
props.description: How rowId-based merges behave when rows become non-contiguous in view.

props.name: colors
props.type: { positive?: string; negative?: string; zero?: string; }

props.name: valueFormatter
props.type: ( value: number | null, context: { series: GridChartSeries; datum: GridChartDatum } ) => string

props.name: pinned
props.description: Defaults to `false`. Set `true` to dock the chart panel using `position`.

props.name: icons
props.type: { drag?: GridChartIconRenderer; maximize?: GridChartIconRenderer; resize?: GridChartIconRenderer; close?: GridChartIconRenderer; settings?: GridChartIconRenderer; }

props.name: valueFormatter
props.type: ( value: number | null, context: { series: GridChartSeries; datum: GridChartDatum } ) => string

props.name: icons
props.type: { drag?: GridChartIconRenderer; maximize?: GridChartIconRenderer; resize?: GridChartIconRenderer; close?: GridChartIconRenderer; settings?: GridChartIconRenderer; }

props.name: pinned
props.description: Defaults to `false`. Set `true` to dock the chart panel using `position`.

props.name: valueFormatter
props.type: ( value: number | null, context: { series: GridChartSeries; datum: GridChartDatum } ) => string

props.name: enableServerRowModel
props.description: Opt-in support for master/detail when SSRM is enabled. Defaults to `false` to preserve existing behavior.

props.name: initialExpandedRowIds
props.description: Uncontrolled mode initial value

props.name: expandedRowIds
props.description: Controlled mode

props.name: isRowMaster
props.description: Determines which rows can show a detail panel (subject to spanning constraints).

props.name: detailRowHeight
props.description: Height of the detail panel when expanded

props.name: renderDetail
props.description: Detail panel content renderer

props.name: renderToggleIcon
props.description: Toggle icon renderer for the dedicated system column

props.name: renderToggleCell
props.description: Full renderer override for the dedicated system toggle cell.

props.name: column
props.description: Customize the system column

featureGroups.label: Tree Data
featureGroups.description: Client-side tree data (AG Grid parity style).

props.name: getDataPath
props.type: ( row: GridRow, rowIndex: number ) => Array<string | number> | null | undefined
props.description: AG Grid style data-path resolver for client tree data mode.

props.name: pathColumnKeys
props.description: Optional column-key mapping for each tree path level. Useful for row-grouping style drag/drop callbacks so moved rows can update level values consistently (for example ["department", "team", "project"]).

props.name: pathField
props.description: Optional field key in `row.data` to resolve path arrays when `getDataPath` is not provided.

props.name: pathSeparator
props.description: Optional delimiter used when `pathField` resolves to a string. Defaults to `/`.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Default expansion for generated tree group rows (default true).

props.name: groupColumnKey
props.description: Column key where tree group labels are rendered.

props.name: enableInfiniteScroll
props.description: Enable host-driven infinite loading for the current row window.

props.name: infiniteScrollBatchSize
props.description: Batch size requested when nearing the edge (default 50).

props.name: infiniteScrollThreshold
props.description: Trigger threshold in pixels from the edge (default 240).

props.name: infiniteScrollMode
props.description: Load direction for infinite scroll (default "bottom").

props.name: infiniteScrollStrategy
props.description: Request strategy for infinite scroll (default "offset").

props.name: infiniteScrollStartIndex
props.description: Start index of the current in-memory window (default 0).

props.name: infiniteScrollInitialCursor
props.description: Optional initial cursor values for cursor-based loading.

props.name: next
props.description: Cursor token to use for the next forward load request.

props.name: prev
props.description: Cursor token to use for the previous/backward load request.

props.name: infiniteScrollPaging
props.description: Treat each load as a page window instead of appending/prepending.

props.name: renderInfiniteScrollLoader
props.type: (args: { isLoading: boolean; hasMore: boolean; direction?: GridInfiniteScrollDirection; }) => ReactNode
props.description: Optional loading indicator customization (shown while loading).

props.name: infiniteScrollTopLoader
props.description: Optional loader shown only when loading from the top edge.

props.name: infiniteScrollBottomLoader
props.description: Optional loader shown only when loading from the bottom edge.

props.name: infiniteScrollLoader
props.description: Optional static loading indicator (shown while loading).

props.name: loadMoreRows
props.description: Used for server-side infinite loading. For "offset" strategy, called with the next [startIndex, stopIndex] window (inclusive) and optional direction. For "page" or "cursor", it receives a request object. The grid does not mutate rows for you; update your data source and pass new `data.rows` (or use `useGrid().appendRows`/`useGrid().prependRows`).

props.name: storeMode
props.description: SSRM cache/store strategy. - `auto` (default): hierarchical for grouped/tree SSRM (except pivot), flat otherwise - `flat`: forces legacy flat SSRM cache - `hierarchical`: forces route-store SSRM when grouping/tree is enabled (falls back to flat for unsupported combos)

props.name: rowCount
props.description: Total row count (optional; can be returned by getRows).

props.name: blockSize
props.description: Block size requested from the server (default 200).

props.name: maxBlocksInCache
props.description: Max blocks kept in cache (default 30).

props.name: prefetchBlocks
props.description: How many blocks ahead/behind to prefetch (default 1).

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Debounce fetches in ms (default 60).

props.name: getRows
props.description: Main fetch contract for SSRM.

props.name: getRowId
props.description: Optional row id resolver for server rows.

props.name: onError
props.description: Optional error handler.

props.name: grouping
props.description: Optional server-side row grouping configuration (AG Grid SSRM style).

props.name: treeData
props.description: Optional server-side tree data configuration (AG Grid parity style).

props.name: pivot
props.description: Optional server-side pivot request configuration.

props.name: pagination
props.description: Optional SSRM pagination compatibility mode.

props.name: enabled
props.description: Enables AG Grid compatible SSRM pagination behavior. When enabled, page controls drive SSRM range requests.

props.name: selection
props.description: Optional SSRM selection-state configuration (AG Grid style).

props.name: enabled
props.description: Enables SSRM selection-state behavior (select-all + toggled ids). Defaults to `true` when SSRM and row selection are enabled.

props.name: state
props.description: Optional controlled SSRM selection state.

props.name: selectAll
props.description: Baseline selection mode: - `true`: all rows are selected except ids listed in `toggledRowIds`. - `false`: no rows are selected except ids listed in `toggledRowIds`.

props.name: toggledRowIds
props.description: Row ids that differ from the baseline represented by `selectAll`.

props.name: selectAllChildren
props.description: AG Grid style hierarchical baseline for grouped SSRM selection. Alias-compatible with `selectAll`.

props.name: toggledNodes
props.description: AG Grid style hierarchical node exceptions for grouped SSRM selection.

props.name: groupSelects
props.description: How group rows affect descendants in SSRM grouped mode.

props.name: onStateChange
props.description: Fired whenever SSRM selection state changes.

props.name: onSelectionChanged
props.description: Fired when SSRM selection updates, with current loaded selected rows.

props.name: apiRef
props.description: Optional API ref for programmatic state access (AG Grid parity style).

props.name: onPivotResultFieldsChange
props.description: Called when SSRM responses include `pivotResultFields`. Useful for generating secondary/pivot columns in the host app.

props.name: loadingCellRenderer
props.description: Optional renderer for SSRM placeholder cell content while blocks are loading. Accepts either a static React node (`<div />`) or a component.

props.name: apiRef
props.description: Optional API ref for SSRM refresh/row updates/transactions (AG Grid parity style).

props.name: onPageChange
props.type: ( pageIndex: number, context: { pageSize: number; pageCount: number; mode: GridPaginationMode } ) => void

props.name: onPageSizeChange
props.type: ( pageSize: number, context: { pageIndex: number; pageCount: number; mode: GridPaginationMode } ) => void

props.name: onPageRequest
props.type: (args: { pageIndex: number; pageSize: number; }) => void | Promise<void>

props.name: onCursorRequest
props.type: (args: { direction: "next" | "prev"; cursor: string | null; pageIndex: number; pageSize: number; }) => void | Promise<void>

props.name: insertRows
props.type: ( ctx: GridContextMenuActionContext & { position: "above" | "below"; count: number; } ) => void

props.name: insertColumns
props.type: ( ctx: GridContextMenuActionContext & { position: "left" | "right"; count: number; } ) => void

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the grid root.

props.name: ariaLabelledBy
props.description: External label element id for the grid root.

props.name: ariaDescribedBy
props.description: External description element id for the grid root.

GridChartType.name: GridChartType
GridChartType.code:
export type GridChartType =
  | "line"
  | "area"
  | "column"
  | "bar"
  | "stackedColumn"
  | "stackedBar"
  | "histogram"
  | "heatmap"
  | "box"
  | "violin"
  | "waterfall"
  | "bullet"
  | "candlestick"
  | "pie"
  | "donut"
  | "scatter"
  | "bubble"
  // Allow custom chart types while preserving literal autocomplete for built-ins.
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/ban-types
  | (string & {});

GridIconDefinition.code:
export type GridIconDefinition<
  State extends GridIconStateBase = GridIconStateBase,
> =
  | GridIconRenderer<State>
  | ComponentType<State>
  | keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements
  | ReactNode;
